reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: An attacker can trigger this via P2P gossip by proposing a block with invalid state transition. The async goroutine in subscriber_beacon_blocks.go:40 reconstructs and saves data columns from the local EL (via processDataColumnSidecarsFromExecution) before ReceiveBlock validation at line 42 completes. During this race window, peers requesting sidecars via DataColumnSidecarsByRoot RPC receive invalid data. Medium severity is appropriate as this affects Prysm (31% of CL network) during the race window only, not persistently network-wide.
